tool.name: Natural Gas Siting Analysis

param.name: depsch_file
param.label: Time-dependent Assumptions *.xlsx
param.help: Must be a CKAN resource ID

param.name: clustdist_file
param.label: Cluster Distribution *.xlsx
param.help: Must be a CKAN resource ID

param.name: ng_file
param.label: NG Polygons *.shp
param.help: Must be a CKAN resource ID

param.name: usstructures_file
param.label: US Structures *.gpkg
param.help: Must be a CKAN resource ID

param.name: ng_tea_single_file
param.label: NG All-points *.csv
param.help: Must be a CKAN resource ID

param.name: ng_tea_cluster_file
param.label: NG points *.csv
param.help: Must be a CKAN resource ID

param.name: ng_tea_cluster_sweep_file
param.label: NG sweep *.csv
param.help: Must be a CKAN resource ID

data.name: output
data.label: Natural Gas Levelized Cost of Energy

tool.help: Runs the MATISSE Natural Gas Siting Analysis script. All inputs must be specified as CKAN resource IDs.
